---
title: "08. 反技艺、反雕刻与制度过塑"
subtitle: "Anti-Artifice and Critique of Over-Structuring"
date: 2026-04-11
order: 8
categories: [zhuangzi, cultural, omega]
description: "These chapters argue that additional carving and regulation do not necessarily produce richer order. The golden-mean shift supplies the sharpest formal parallel: minimal admissibility constraints can ..."
---

**Chapters:** 8, 9, 10  
**Omega Directions:** `golden-mean-shift`, `fold-operator`, `rate-distortion-information-theory`

{{< include articles/category_08_anti_artifice_critique_of_overstructuring.md >}}

---

## Infographic

![category_08_anti_artifice_critique_of_overstructuring Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_08_anti_artifice_critique_of_overstructuring_infographic.png)

## Video

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_08_anti_artifice_critique_of_overstructuring_video.mp4 >}}

- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_08_anti_artifice_critique_of_overstructuring_infographic.png)
